      exact h ⟨w', hw', h_le⟩

intro h_rev
    rw [moves_unreverse, Set.mem_iUnion₂] at h_rev
    obtain ⟨u, hu, ⟨v, hv, hxv⟩⟩ := h_rev
    grw [unreverse_equiv] at hxv
    rw [reverseSet] at hv
    split_ifs at hv with h_u_rev
    · cases p
      · obtain ⟨k, hk, hzk⟩ := h_u_rev.choose_spec
        exact h ⟨u, hu, (le_of_left_le hk hzk).trans ((le_of_right_le hv le_rfl).trans hxv)⟩
      · obtain ⟨k, hk, hzk⟩ := h_u_rev.choose_spec
        exact h ⟨u, hu, hxv.trans ((le_of_le_right le_rfl hv).trans (le_of_le_right hzk hk))⟩
    · subst hv
      exact h (by cases p <;> exact ⟨u, hu, hxv⟩)

intro h_rev
    cases p <;>
    · simp [reversible_left, reversible_right] at h_rev h
      obtain ⟨w, hw, hwx⟩ := h_rev
      rw [moves_unreverse, Set.mem_iUnion₂] at hw
      obtain ⟨u, hu, ⟨v, hv, rfl⟩⟩ := hw
      rw [unreverse_equiv] at hwx
      split_ifs at hv with hr
      · apply h ⟨u, hu, ?_⟩
        refine le_trans ?_ (le_of_right_le (le_trans ?_ hwx) hv)
        · exact hr.choose_spec.2
        · exact (hr.choose_spec.1.trans_le (le_of_left_move_le le_rfl hr.choose_spec.1)).le
      · cases hv; subst v
        exact h ⟨u, hu, hwx⟩

intro h_rev
    apply h
    cases p <;>
    · obtain ⟨w, hw, hle⟩ := h_rev
      rw [moves_unreverse] at hw
      obtain ⟨y', hy', ⟨z, hz, rfl⟩⟩ := hw
      rw [unreverse_equiv] at hle
      rw [reverseSet] at hz
      split_ifs at hz with h'
      · exact (h'.choose_spec.2.trans (hle.trans (lf_of_mem_moves hy').le)).not_lt (lf_of_mem_moves hz)
      · subst hz
        exact ⟨y', hy', hle⟩

intro h_rev
    cases p <;> simp only [reversible_left, reversible_right] at h h_rev
    all_goals
      obtain ⟨w, hw, hw_le⟩ := h_rev
      rw [moves_unreverse, Set.mem_iUnion₂] at hw
      obtain ⟨v, hv, ⟨u, hu, rfl⟩⟩ := hw
      rw [unreverse_equiv] at hw_le
      by_cases h_rev_v : Reversible y v _
      · aesop
      · rw [reverseSet_of_not_reversible h_rev_v] at hu
        subst hu
        exact h ⟨v, hv, hw_le⟩

intro H
    cases p
    · obtain ⟨W, hW, hWx⟩ := H
      have := (unreverse_equiv y).ge
      rw [le_def] at this
      obtain ⟨w, hw, hwW⟩ := this.2 W hW
      exact h ⟨w, hw, hwW.trans (hWx.trans (unreverse_equiv x).le)⟩
    · obtain ⟨W, hW, hxW⟩ := H
      have := (unreverse_equiv y).le
      rw [le_def] at this
      obtain ⟨w, hw, hWw⟩ := this.1 W hW
      exact h ⟨w, hw, (unreverse_equiv x).ge.trans (hxW.trans hWw)⟩

intro h_rev
    have hy := (unreverse_equiv y).1
    cases p
    · rw [reversible_left] at h_rev h
      obtain ⟨w, hw, hw_le⟩ := h_rev
      obtain ⟨u, hu, hu_le⟩ := (le_def.1 hy).2 w hw
      exact h ⟨u, hu, hu_le.trans (hw_le.trans (unreverse_equiv x).1)⟩
    · rw [reversible_right] at h_rev h
      obtain ⟨w, hw, le_hw⟩ := h_rev
      obtain ⟨u, hu, le_hu⟩ := (le_def.1 hy).1 w hw
      exact h ⟨u, hu, (unreverse_equiv x).2.trans (le_hw.trans le_hu)⟩

intro h'
    cases p
    · obtain ⟨w, hw, hw'⟩ := h'
      rw [moves_unreverse, Set.mem_iUnion₂] at hw
      obtain ⟨v, hv, ⟨u, hu, rfl⟩⟩ := hw
      rw [unreverse_equiv] at hw'
      by_cases h'' : Reversible y v right
      · rw [reverseSet_of_reversible h''] at hu
        apply not_le_of_mem_moves_right hu
        exact (h''.le_choose.trans (le_trans (le_of_mem_moves_right hv) hw'))
      · rw [reverseSet_of_not_reversible h''] at hu
        subst hu
        exact h ⟨v, hv, hw'⟩
    · obtain ⟨w, hw, hw'⟩ := h'
      rw [moves_unreverse, Set.mem_iUnion₂] at hw
      obtain ⟨v, hv, ⟨u, hu, rfl⟩⟩ := hw
      grw [unreverse_equiv] at hw'
      by_cases h'' : Reversible y v left
      · rw [reverseSet_of_reversible h''] at hu
        apply not_le_of_mem_moves_left hu
        exact ((hw'.trans (le_of_mem_moves_left hv)).trans h''.choose_le)
      · rw [reverseSet_of_not_reversible h''] at hu
        subst hu
        exact h ⟨v, hv, hw'⟩
